value.label: Extreme
value.description: Life-threatening. Tornado Warning, Hurricane Warning, Flash Flood Emergency. Stop all field work immediately.

value.label: Severe
value.description: High risk. Severe Thunderstorm Warning, Flash Flood Warning, Winter Storm Warning. Suspend outdoor work.

value.label: Moderate
value.description: Elevated risk. Any Watch advisory. Proceed with caution, monitor conditions.

value.label: Minor
value.description: Low risk. Frost Advisory, Dense Fog Advisory, Heat Advisory. Awareness only.

value.label: Unknown
value.description: Alert type not matched to a classification. Review manually.
